name: skillgate-agents
tagline: Runtime security for Claude Code agents
description: Enforce capability policies, detect prompt injection across all Claude Code attack surfaces (MCP tools, hooks, instruction files, slash commands, memory, sub-agents), and produce signed audit records — all without leaving your editor.
capabilities: Blocks prompt injection in MCP tool descriptions before model exposure
Enforces capability policy on Bash, Write, WebFetch, and Task tool calls via hooks
Scans CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, slash commands, and memory files for injection patterns
Reviews and signs Claude Code hooks against capability policy
Supports org/user/repo governance scopes with deterministic precedence and identity binding
Produces Ed25519-signed audit records for every enforcement decision
Security-sentinel agent provides SAFE / REVIEW REQUIRED / BLOCKED verdicts

slash_commands.description: Set up a complete security baseline for the current project
Show recent enforcement decisions and policy violations
Scan MCP servers for tool description poisoning and drift
Review and sign hooks against capability policy
Scan instruction files and slash commands for injection
Start, verify, or troubleshoot the runtime sidecar
